more.title: Zimbabwe exports US$11,7 million worth of goods to Europe in a month
more.description: ZIMBABWE exported goods worth US$11,7 million to the European Union (EU) in the month of March 2026 in a development which further demystifies the existence of economic sanctions against the African nation. While Western powers state that “smart sanctions” aimed at leadership, Zimbabwe and regional partners argue they cripple the overall economy.
